name: anonymous user at turn 12 — persistence-adjacent ask fires auth_user immediately
description: Hard-signup window (turns 10–14). The SIGNUP_HARD directive instructs the agent: "if the user says anything persistence-adjacent — 'can you remember', 'save this', 'will you know me next time' — call auth_user({mode:'google'}) THIS TURN. No clarifying question." This is the load-bearing nudge — the agent ratchets from soft mention to active tool fire once the user signals they want continuity. The USAGE credit-count block adds truthful turn numbers (free turn 12 of 25). Sibling of the WORKSPACE-ASK TRIGGER fixture but at funnel-position 12 instead of fresh.

parts.text: can you remember this conversation so we can pick it up tomorrow?
I want to save this so I don't lose the thread
